title: oldenlandia quadrangularis
intro: Oldenlandia quadrangularis, also known as Quadrangularis, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia quadrangularis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. In traditional herbal medicine, Oldenlandia quadrangularis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in the form of capsules or tablets, although its effectiveness and safety as a treatment for specific health conditions require further scientific research and validation.
